summary: Frontend-only iteration validating the multi-page React Router refactor of La Neuron STEAM Academy. 24/24 Playwright checks passed: all 7 routes load with correct headings (Home, About, What is STEAM?, Why STEAM?, Programmes, Summer Camp, FAQ) plus /register; navbar active highlight works; nav-register-btn navigates to /register; Home explore-grid cards (home-link-*) navigate correctly; Summer Camp shows the 5 new lab names (Wonder/Build/Bio/Planet/Food), Start date '6 July 2026', Location 'Stakkato, Kraków' and the krakow-map iframe; flip cards on /why-steam (why-card-0..5) and /summer-camp (camp-day-Monday..Friday) toggle aria-pressed true/false on click; all 6 method-step nodes render on /why-steam and 'Scientific Method' section heading is present; navbar logo is big (200px) on Home top and shrinks to 64px on scroll, and is always compact (64px) on inner pages; Register form empty-submit shows 'Please fill in all required fields' toast and does not submit; full Register flow (TEST_ prefixed) hits POST /api/enquiries, transitions to register-success with 'Enquiry received!'.
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar 'big logo' branch only triggers when pathname === '/' AND not scrolled. Works correctly but the resulting 220px header height on mobile (h-28 sm:h-[220px]) is very tall and consumes the entire viewport — consider reducing on small screens.
FlipCard's outer wrapper has role='button' on a div; consider rendering as a real <button> for better accessibility (Enter/Space already handled).
Register.jsx still has child_age min=6/max=13 on the input while backend permits 4-16 — flagged in iteration_1, still unresolved (low priority since marketed age range is 6-13).

success_rate.backend: 100% (not re-tested this iteration; previous pytest suite passes)

test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this app
seed_data_creation: One additional TEST_-prefixed enquiry created in mongo `enquiries` collection (parent_name='TEST_Parent QA', child_name='TEST_Child', email='test_qa_router@example.com'). Safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-page routing fully verified. data-testid coverage is complete: nav-{home,about,what-is-steam,why-steam,programmes,summer-camp,faq,register-btn}, home-link-{about,what-is-steam,why-steam,programmes,summer-camp,faq}, why-card-{0..5}, camp-day-{Monday..Friday}, method-step-{1..6}, krakow-map, register-form, input-*, select-week, select-programme, register-submit-btn, register-success. FlipCard exposes aria-pressed which is the reliable way to assert flip state (rotateY transform also works but slower). Radix Select dropdowns need ~400-500ms wait after open before clicking [role='option']. Empty-submit toast text: 'Please fill in all required fields.' Success toast text: 'Enquiry received! We will respond within 24 hours.'
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
